title: Database Schema
purpose: Provides live database structure and optional collection context for AI.

idle.meaning: Node has not started for the current run.

processing.meaning: Node is actively computing. Pulsating indicates processing, not waiting. Outgoing edges stay inactive until an output port receives a value.

waiting.meaning: Node is waiting for an external callback/response. Previously consumed input edges must stop animating; outgoing edges remain inactive until output exists.

success.meaning: Node completed successfully and emitted output values.

error.meaning: Node failed and may emit error-specific outputs.

skipped.meaning: Node execution was skipped by control flow or guard conditions.

wireActivationRules.processing: When node is processing, show node pulse only. Do not animate outgoing edges until an output port value is produced.
wireActivationRules.waiting: When node is waiting for external response, keep both consumed incoming and future outgoing edges inactive.
wireActivationRules.completed: Animate only edges carrying newly emitted outputs.
wireActivationRules.errored: Animate only explicit error-route outputs (if connected).

fields.description: Which provider to load: auto (primary) or mongodb.
all = include all collections; selected = include only `collections`.
Collection names to include when mode is selected.
schema = emit structure only; live_context = emit latest collection rows; schema_and_live_context = emit both.
Collections to fetch as live context during runtime. Falls back to selected schema collections when empty.
Optional JSON filter or free-text search applied to each live context collection. Supports runtime templates such as `{{context.catalogId}}` or `{{bundle.categoryId}}`.
Maximum documents fetched per live context collection during runtime.
Include field lists for each collection.
Include inferred relations/foreign key hints when available.
json emits structured schema/context payloads; text emits prompt-ready context text.
Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run.
Cache key scope. run = isolate each run, activation = isolate by trigger/entity context, session = reuse across session.
If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node.
